name: Principal Residence Sale Reporting Exclusion

eligibility.description: Applies to sales of principal residences for $250,000 or less ($500,000 for married couples) where the seller provides written assurance that the gain is fully excludable from gross income.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can prevent the reporting of a home sale to the IRS by providing written assurance that the full gain is excludable under Section 121.
